ODX (Open Drone Map / WebODM engine) is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0).

OpenPVScope invokes ODX as a separate installed program via subprocess. The ODX installer bundled or chained by OpenPVScope Setup is a companion product, not part of the OpenPVScope MIT binary.

Source and license: https://github.com/WebODM/ODX
